tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Intro: [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Beauty queen of only eighteen[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
She had some trouble with herself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
He was always there to help her[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
She always belonged to someone else[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
I drove for miles and miles[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
And wound up at your door[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I've had you so many times but[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
somehow I want more[/tab]

[CHORUS]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
I don't mind spending everyday[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Out on your corner in the pouring rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
Look for the girl with the broken smile[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Ask her if she wants to stay awhile[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
And she will be loved[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
And she will be loved[/tab]

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

Verse 2

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Tap on my window knock on my door[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
I want to make you feel beautiful[/tab]
